svg.title: Learning roadmap for building the app — concepts ordered by when you need them
svg.desc: Four phases: MVP core, ITS algorithms, emotion and multimodal, and scale

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What React Native and Expo concepts do I need to learn first?')
sendPrompt('What FastAPI concepts do I need for this backend?')
sendPrompt('How do I integrate Google Cloud Speech-to-Text for Tamil?')
sendPrompt('Teach me Bayesian Knowledge Tracing with a simple Python example')
sendPrompt('What is FSRS spaced repetition and how is it different from Anki?')
sendPrompt('How do I build a skill prerequisite graph for Tamil script learning?')
sendPrompt('How do I detect frustration from session events in Python?')
sendPrompt('How do I add AAC symbol grid input to a React Native app?')
sendPrompt('What should a therapist IEP progress report contain and how do I export it?')
sendPrompt('What is Deep Knowledge Tracing and when should I upgrade to it?')
sendPrompt('When do I need Pinecone and how does vector search help the ITS?')
sendPrompt('How would I add ML Kit handwriting recognition for Tamil script?')
